goal: Attempt all remaining future capability tracks without activating unsafe production behavior.
testsAdded: source/include and duplicate production activation decision review model tests
GTK screenshot/accessibility assertions for source/include and duplicate activation decision cards
nextRecommendedAction: Design an explicit production activation path that can consume approved-but-default-disabled source/include and duplicate decisions while keeping production flags false by default.

coreAppShellUiNavigation.evidence: Added disabled Config-page production activation decision review cards for source/include and duplicate paths, backed by GTK screenshot plus AT-SPI assertions.

configDiscoverySourceAwareModel.evidence: Added copied-config-tree harness plus source/include production gate review requiring explicit selected target, source-graph membership, and matching copied proof.

safeNormalScalarWrites.evidence: Copied-config-tree source/include proof runs guarded insertion against copied targets, verifies the planned line, restores copied bytes, and proves originals unchanged.

releasePackagingTagArtifacts.evidence: v0.1.0 tag and dist/v0.1.0 artifacts preserved.

missingDefaultInsertion.evidence: Source/include activation decision consumes report-backed approval card proof and reaches ApprovedButDefaultDisabled while production insertion remains disabled.

duplicateResolution.evidence: Duplicate activation decision consumes report-backed approval card proof and reaches ApprovedButDefaultDisabled while production duplicate writes remain disabled.

highRiskDisplayRecovery.evidence: High-risk/display approval card fields now load from serialized report records and screenshot assertions show runtime proof is insufficient plus recovery blockers remain visible.

structuredFamilyEditorsWrites.evidence: Structured hl.bind approval card fields now load from serialized report records and are screenshot/assertion covered while production structured writes remain disabled.

profileModeSwitching.evidence: Profile/mode approval card fields now load from serialized report records and are screenshot/assertion covered while real profile switching remains disabled.

runtimeReloadIntegration.evidence: Runtime socket diagnosis identified sandbox EPERM as the timeout root cause; outside-sandbox read-only hyprctl succeeded. Controlled hl.config eval live restore changed gaps_in from 5 to 6, restored it to 5, feeds an approved_but_default_disabled runtime approval review, and is now displayed in a disabled detail UI surface while production runtime remains disabled.

hyprland0554Migration.evidence: Hyprland 0.55.4 migration approval card fields now load from serialized report records and screenshot assertions show advisory evidence, missing trusted data, active v0.55.2 model, and inactive migration.

priorityTrackStatus.sourceIncludeInsertionTargetSelectionUi: implemented_but_disabled: detail-pane review surface shows root config, candidate target files, selected target state, readiness state, and disabled planned target actions; source/include insertion remains blocked.
priorityTrackStatus.duplicateProductionApproval: implemented_but_disabled: production approval gate and precondition fingerprint model exist; confirmation-gated safe-env replacement wrapper exists; production Apply remains blocked.
priorityTrackStatus.structuredFamilyLosslessProof: safe_env_only: hl.bind lossless render and temp-fixture exact-line edit proof exists; production structured writes remain blocked.
priorityTrackStatus.highRiskLiveRecoveryProof: implemented_but_disabled: no-op live readiness protocol exists and refuses real config/runtime mutation; live mutation proof still not run.
priorityTrackStatus.sourceIncludeFixtureTargetSelectionProof: safe_env_only: fixture proof requires explicit selected target, blocks no-selection, generated/script-managed, symlink/profile, unknown, duplicate/ambiguous targets, and never enables production insertion.
priorityTrackStatus.disabledDuplicatePreApplyUi: implemented_but_disabled: setting detail duplicate selector now shows pre-Apply approval state, precondition fingerprint, block reason, and disabled confirmation action.
priorityTrackStatus.sourceIncludeSelectedTargetDryRunPlanner: safe_env_only: selected root and sourced fixture targets produce exact dry-run insertion previews through the existing missing/default insertion plan; no production source/include insertion is enabled.
priorityTrackStatus.sourceIncludeDryRunPreviewUi: implemented_but_disabled: selected-target dry-run preview is visible in the disabled detail UI and shows root path, target path, source depth, planned line, status, and disabled planned execution action.
priorityTrackStatus.sourceIncludeGuardedExecutor: tested_and_restored: temp-fixture guarded executor inserts the planned line, verifies it, restores original bytes, and verifies restored content fingerprint.
priorityTrackStatus.duplicateGuardedExecutor: tested_and_restored: temp-fixture guarded executor requires confirmed matching occurrence and restores original file bytes after replacement proof.
priorityTrackStatus.structuredGuardedExecutor: tested_and_restored: hl.bind temp-fixture guarded executor validates candidate, edits exact selected line, verifies new raw line, and restores original bytes.
priorityTrackStatus.profileModeGuardedExecutor: tested_and_restored: temp-fixture guarded executor switches a symlink, verifies target, restores original target, and refuses real profile paths by default.
priorityTrackStatus.runtimeGuardedExecutor: tested_and_restored: controlled outside-sandbox hl.config eval proof changed gaps_in from 5 to 6, restored it to 5, and production runtime remains disabled.
priorityTrackStatus.runtimeApprovalLiveRestoreGate: approved_but_default_disabled: proven hl.config eval live-restore proof plus exact runtime approval evidence reaches approved_but_default_disabled, never production enabled.
priorityTrackStatus.runtimeApprovalUiSurface: implemented_but_disabled: setting detail review surface displays the proven hl.config eval command pair, prior/temp values, readbacks, approval status, and disabled production runtime/reload state with an insensitive planned enable action.
priorityTrackStatus.disabledApprovalUiCards: implemented_but_disabled: Config page now shows disabled review-only cards for source/include insertion, duplicate replacement, structured hl.bind writes, profile/mode switching, high-risk/display writes, and Hyprland 0.55.4 migration. Every card has stable widget names, proof/blocker copy, disabled planned action, and no production handler.
priorityTrackStatus.deepApprovalCardData: implemented_but_disabled: the six disabled approval cards now render structured proof source, proof status, proof fields, preconditions, restore/unchanged evidence, blockers, and production-disabled status from deep projection data.
priorityTrackStatus.highRiskLiveReadinessExecutor: implemented_but_disabled: no-op readiness executor requires recovery channel, dead-man timeout, and restore command evidence and refuses mutation by default.
priorityTrackStatus.hyprland0554LocalEvidenceCollector: implemented_but_disabled: local package/runtime evidence is advisory only and cannot activate migration without trusted exports and review proof.
priorityTrackStatus.copiedConfigTreeProof: copied_config_tree_proven: copied source/include, duplicate, structured bind, and profile symlink executors ran against temp copied config trees, restored copied targets, and verified originals unchanged.
priorityTrackStatus.controlledLiveTestGuard: implemented_but_disabled: guard records backup, content fingerprints, symlink, runtime snapshot, restore, post-restore verification, out-of-band recovery, trusted-data, and explicit live flag requirements before any live mutation.
priorityTrackStatus.defaultDisabledProductionGates: ready_but_default_disabled: source/include, duplicate, structured hl.bind, and profile gates can review copied proof while keeping production disabled; runtime, high-risk, and 0.55.4 gates block on missing live/trusted evidence.
priorityTrackStatus.explicitApprovalFlow: implemented_but_disabled: approval scopes require exact target/command, copied or live proof, old/proposed state, restore plan, one-shot or expiry behavior, and never enable production by default.
priorityTrackStatus.runtimeSocketDiagnosis: live_readonly_evidence: sandbox EPERM explains the prior timeout; outside-sandbox hyprctl version, monitors, and getoption queries succeeded.
priorityTrackStatus.runtimeLiveRestoreProof: live_restore_proven: prior gaps_in value 5 and temporary value 6 were prepared with restore command first; keyword and assignment eval failed before value change, then hl.config eval succeeded and restored readback to 5.

categoryCoverageThisSprint.coreAppShellUiNavigation: disabled duplicate pre-Apply review UI and source/include selected-target dry-run preview UI are present with source tests
categoryCoverageThisSprint.configDiscoverySourceAwareModel: source/include selected-target dry-run planner and guarded temp executor model selected root/source targets and blocked managed/unknown/ambiguous targets
categoryCoverageThisSprint.rowReadWriteModel: future capability tests continue asserting SAFE_WRITABLE_ROWS remains 341; no row inventory changed
categoryCoverageThisSprint.safeNormalScalarWrites: selected-target dry-run integrates with the existing missing/default insertion plan but does not write connected files
categoryCoverageThisSprint.releasePackagingTagArtifacts: v0.1.0 tag and dist/v0.1.0 preserved; no release artifact mutation
categoryCoverageThisSprint.missingDefaultInsertion: source/include dry-run preview UI and guarded temp executor added; production source/include insertion remains blocked
categoryCoverageThisSprint.duplicateResolution: guarded temp executor added for reversible duplicate replacement proof; production duplicate writes remain blocked
categoryCoverageThisSprint.highRiskDisplayRecovery: guarded no-op readiness executor added and requires out-of-band recovery before high-risk/display mutation
categoryCoverageThisSprint.structuredFamilyEditorsWrites: guarded hl.bind temp executor added for reversible structured write proof; production structured writes remain blocked
categoryCoverageThisSprint.profileModeSwitching: guarded temp symlink executor added and verifies restored target; real profile switching remains blocked
categoryCoverageThisSprint.runtimeReloadIntegration: guarded runtime proof executed one low-risk hl.config eval mutation, restored the prior value, and now feeds a default-disabled runtime approval review while keeping production runtime/reload disabled
categoryCoverageThisSprint.hyprland0554Migration: local evidence collector added; migration remains inactive until trusted bundle proof exists
